title: Nutmeg Grater Stainless Steel Cheese Grater Handheld Nutmeg Grinder with Container for Kitchen Hard Cheese Citrus Fruits Garlic Nut and Nutmeg
features: 【Quality Material】This nutmeg grater is made of high-quality stainless steel, resistant to rust, corrosion and wear, and can be used for a long time has a long service life than ordinary wire planers.
【Advantages】This nut grater is a one-piece design, which is not easy to fall off or break. It is ergonomically designed, easy to hold and easy to use.
【With Container】There is a container on the grater, which can be used to store the planed excess nutmeg powder for use next time.

【Sharp Planer】The densely distributed small grater holes are sharp and delicate, making it easy for you to plane powder and easy to use.Hanging holes are also attached for convenient storage and table space saving. Just hang them on the wall or put them in cabinets and drawers. They are the perfect small tools for your kitchen.
【Widely Used】The grinder can grind fresh nutmeg easily and quickly. It can also be used to grind cheese, lemon peel, ginger, garlic, etc. It is a good helper for kitchen grinding.
